channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open: Novak Djokovic and new coach Andy Murray get a win against US teen in debut
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic's first match with former rival Andy Murray as his coach did not start all that well, even against a 19-year-old making his Grand Slam debut.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Frances Tiafoe picks up a tough victory after throwing up at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Frances Tiafoe threw up during his first-round match at the Australian Open on Monday along the way to a five-set victory and said afterward he might have quit if this had been just a run-of-the-mill tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jannik Sinner starts his Australian Open title defense with a straight set win
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — After wasting a set point in the second tiebreaker with an ill-conceived drop shot, Jannik Sinner quickly reverted to what's been working for him and finished off a straight-set win over Nicolas Jarry to begin his Australian Open title defense.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen leads balanced offense as Bills dominate Broncos for 31-7 wild-card win
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills' spread-the-wealth approach on offense that was so productive in the regular season proved unstoppable in their playoff opener.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nick Taylor wins another playoff with clutch play on the 18th in the Sony Open
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Nick Taylor in a playoff is tough to beat. Getting there was hardest part for the Canadian, who delivered another highlight reel of clutch moments Sunday in the Sony Open.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurts tosses 2 TD passes and Goedert throws 3 stiff-arms to lead Eagles past Packers 22-10
item.description: Jalen Hurts threw two touchdown passes in his first game since a late-season concussion, Dallas Goedert threw three stiff-arms on a rugged touchdown catch and the Philadelphia Eagles rode their NFL-best defense to a 22-10 wild-card playoff win over the Green Bay Packers.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Clippers, Lakers to resume their wildfire-delayed schedules on Monday
item.description: NBA games are scheduled to return to wildfire-ravaged Los Angeles on Monday night, with the Clippers planning to resume their schedule when they host the Miami Heat and the Lakers set to host Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Derrick Henry, Ravens run wild for win over Steelers in NFL playoffs
item.description: The Baltimore Ravens ran all over the Pittsburgh Steelers on Saturday night to advance to the divisional round of the NFL playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston's D'Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans' wild-card playoff victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday — the first such play in NFL postseason history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nationals and Jorge López agree to $3 million, 1-year deal
item.description: The Washington Nationals and former All-Star pitcher Jorge López agreed to terms on a 1-year contract, the team announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Blue Jays add All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman with $33 million, 3-year contract
item.description: All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman and the Toronto Blue Jays have agreed to a $33 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs Bonus: Tampa Bay looking for similar results in Wild Card rematch against Washington
item.description: With the Buccaneers gearing up for their fifth straight Post Season run, Barber joins a special episode of Bucs Bonus to talk about what the team needs to do to contain rookie quarterback phenom Jayden Daniels and the Washington Commanders offense that has leveled up since the two teams met in week
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Google Trends: Nearly every US state is searching the Broncos over the Bills
item.description: We looked at Google Trends statistics to see whether the Broncos or the Bills were the talk of the country – and one team won by a landslide.
item.dc:creator: Morgan Whitley, Fox 5

item.title: Brayden Point reaches 600 career points in Lightning's 4-1 victory over the Bruins
item.description: Brayden Point reached 600 career points with a power-play goal, Andrei Vasilevskiy made 27 saves, and the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Boston Bruins 4-1 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here's how much it will cost to (possibly) see Messi play in San Jose
item.description: (KRON) -- Tickets for the San Jose Earthquakes' home match against Inter Miami went on sale Thursday. The match offers a potential chance for Bay Area soccer fans to see Miami and Argentina star Lionel Messi in action.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Lakers game postponed Thursday; coach JJ Redick reportedly loses home in Palisades Fire
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers game against the Charlotte Hornets scheduled for Thursday evening has been postponed as the community reels from the devastating fires throughout the city. The team announced the postponement on X on Thursday, stating that it'll be rescheduled to "focus on what matters most.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Connor Bedard continues hot stretch, career-best point streak at 8 games as Blackhawks beat Avalanche
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor Bedard is on a hot streak, even if the Blackhawks haven't been too hot lately. Bedard continued his roll on Wednesday night with a goal and an assist, and this time it led to a win, as the Blackhawks beat the Colorado Avalanche, 3-1, at the United Center.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Independent streak helped build Notre Dame into football's historic and now modern behemoth
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — It was some combination of religion, a grudge involving Knute Rockne and maybe the simple notion that some people just don't like Notre Dame.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls fall to Pacers, 2-game winning streak snapped as longest homestand of season begins
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Bulls were looking to go into their longest homestand of the season on a three-game winning streak. Instead, they'll be trying to start a new one.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Outdoor hockey is coming to Florida. The NHL will have games in Miami and Tampa next season
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Hockey. Outdoors. In Florida. Next season, the NHL is making it happen — twice. The NHL announced Wednesday that the Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers will play host to the New York Rangers at loanDepot Park in Miami — home of baseball’s Marlins — on Jan.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Emeka Eneli, Diego Luna called to USMNT Camp after breakout seasons
item.description: Real Salt Lake midfielder Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna's stellar 2024 MLS campaigns have been rewarded with call-ups to the U.S. Men's National Team's January training camp, making a pivotal moment in their burgeoning careers.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Top-ranked Central girls wrestling is all about toughness and grit
item.description: Undefeated as a team to start the season, Central girls wrestling was just ranked 20th in the entire country by FloWrestling.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Raiders fire coach Antonio Pierce after he goes 4-13 in lone full season
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Antonio Pierce stood behind a lectern and took questions during an end-of-season news conference, even though his future as the Las Vegas Raiders' coach remained very much in question.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Athletics agree to $60M, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, AP source says
item.description: (AP) -- The Athletics have agreed to a $60 million, five-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Monday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: CMU Women's wrestler Marissa Gallegos reflects on wrestling journey
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Marissa Gallegos is no stranger to the spotlight. The Colorado Mesa University star has cemented her legacy as the winningest women’s wrestler in program history. Her career, defined by grit, dominance, and determination, has inspired athletes across the sport.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Coby White stars as Bulls rally past Spurs for 114-110 victory
item.description: Coby White made a go-ahead layup with 47 seconds left, and the Chicago Bulls topped Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs 114-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State cracks the top-25 rankings
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a 14-1 start, the Utah State basketball team is back in the top-25. The Aggies check in at No. 25 in both the AP Top 25 and USA Today Coaches Poll. Utah State is 4-0 in Mountain West play, under first-year USU head coach Jerrod Calhoun.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation
